did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper proposes a deterministic algorithm for quantitative measurement of asymmetry in skin lesions using geometric features (Normalized E-Factor) on binary digital images. It does not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain its results; instead, it compares its algorithmic output against dermatologist assessments. While it references a CNN study (Esteva et al.) in the discussion, it does not use AI itself.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
